name: Count vowels (case-insensitive)
task: Create /tmp/eval_vowels/vowels.py with count_vowels(s) returning the number of vowels (a,e,i,o,u — both cases) in s.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_vowels/vowels.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); C = mod.count_vowels; assert C('Hello World') == 3; assert C('AEIOU') == 5; assert C('xyz') == 0; assert C('') == 0; print('OK')
